scenarios.name: no_tags_handling
scenarios.prompt: We are preparing the first release of this project. There are no prior release tags. Check the git log for all commits and generate brief release notes summarizing the key changes. Output the notes in markdown format with a version heading.

assertions.context: agent generates release notes mentioning release/version/changes

scenarios.name: prior_tag_changelog
scenarios.prompt: We are preparing the next release. Check the git log for commits since the last release tag and generate release notes. List only the changes since the last tag.

assertions.context: agent generates changelog since prior tag
